long_description:
Affected Support: On-site personnel coverage
Location: Dal14
Ensuing shift coverage at Dal14 for the night shift from 00:00-12:00 UTC (1800-0600 CST). During this time, we will not be able to respond to on-site requests and/or troubleshooting. In the event of potential power or cooling events identified through monitoring, or SEV1 & SEV2 customer-related tickets and cases, please use the Data Center escalation points per https://confluence.softlayer.local/display/DCOps/DCO+Emergency+Contact+List
short_description: Onsite Resource Availability - Team Coverage Withdrawn (Night) - DAL14
current_status_next_steps: Normal operations were maintained during this window.
